stemHtml: As the pilot of a modern jet transport aircraft, in an extended cruise, with the autopilot and all systems operating correctly, what must you do to maintain longitudinal trim of the aeroplane?

options.a: As fuel is used from the wing tips, the CG will be moving forwards, so you must periodically trim nose-up.
options.b: As fuel is used from the wing roots, the CG will be moving backwards, so you must periodically trim nose-down.
options.c: Nothing, the autotrim system will ensure the standing loads on the elevator are removed.
options.d: Periodically disconnect the autopilot and trim out any standing loads on the elevators.
